data.title: Seuritize grows ACRED Fund to Sei using Wormhole's blockchain tech, boosting access and liquidity for investors.
data.description: Securitize has expanded its Apollo Diversified Credit Fund (ACRED) to the Sei network by utilizing Wormhole's multichain interoperability. This move aims to improve liquidity and increase accessibility for institutional investors. The extension of ACRED to the Sei network enables a broader range of investors to participate in the fund's opportunities. This partnership leverages Wormhole's technology to enhance the functionality of ACRED and provide a seamless experience across different chains. The collaboration is expected to attract a significant number of institutional investors seeking diversified credit options.

data.title: Glenn Devitt of Digital Legacy AI focuses on $19 trillion wealth transfer crisis with patent-protected AI vault tech.
data.description: Glenn Devitt, a former Army Intelligence specialist, has introduced patent-protected AI vault technology designed to combat the $19 trillion generational wealth transfer crisis. Devitt, the founder and CEO of Digital Legacy AI, unveiled this innovative solution in Miami on September 26, 2025. By creating this technology, he aims to address the substantial wealth transfer occurring in the US, making it the most significant one in the country's history.
Trump Claims "The Economic Numbers Are Great"

data.title: VENU's amphitheatre empire expansion covered by 24/7 market news, capturing the resonance of billions.
data.description: In a recent development, it has been reported that the local government has allocated a total of $5 million to fund a new initiative aimed at improving public transportation services in the city. The initiative is expected to benefit over 50,000 residents who rely on public transportation for their daily commute. The funding will be used to upgrade existing infrastructure, increase the frequency of bus and train services, and implement new technologies to enhance the overall public transportation experience. This investment is part of a larger effort to address the growing demand for reliable and efficient transportation options in the area.

data.title: Dreame introduces the H15 Pro CarpetFlex, a wet dry vacuum for whole-home cleaning; offering exceptional performance.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, in Los Angeles, innovative smart home cleaning solutions company Dreame introduced the H15 Pro CarpetFlex. This wet dry vacuum marks their first foray into this product category, offering outstanding performance on various surfaces such as carpets, rugs, hardwood, and tile. The H15 Pro CarpetFlex is designed to provide exceptional cleaning results.

data.title: Woodlife Farm Market in New Lebanon, NY will host a free fall event on Oct. 3-4 with local chefs, live music, and fire dancers.
data.description: In the picturesque town of New Lebanon, N.Y., Woodlife Farm Market is set to hold a free fall event on October 3-4, 2025. This family-friendly gathering will feature talented local chefs showcasing their culinary skills, live music performances, and mesmerizing fire dancers. Situated at the meeting point of the Hudson Valley and the Berkshires, attendees can enjoy a weekend filled with entertainment and delicious food. The event will start on Friday and promises a vibrant atmosphere for all who join, celebrating the local culture and creativity.

data.title: Cineverse and Bloody Disgusting present 31 Days of Halloween on SCREAMBOX, airing 'Bloodsuckers and the Grimoire' on Oct. 21. #HorrorFlicks
data.description: Premiering on October 21, "Bloodsuckers and the Grimoire" will be showcased on SCREAMBOX. Cineverse, listed on Nasdaq as CNVS, a cutting-edge entertainment studio, along with its horror branch Bloody Disgusting, revealed that 31 Days of Halloween will be featured on their platform. The event is scheduled to commence on September 26, 2025, in Los Angeles.

data.title: SCSP teams up with multiple organizations for AI Unlocked event in National Landing on Oct 3-4, 2025.
data.description: A two-day event called AI Unlocked will be held by the Special Competitive Studies Project (SCSP) in Arlington, VA on October 3-4, 2025. The event will feature policy discussions and a public festival with live demos, interactive exhibits, and more. It is expected to attract a large audience as it is free to attend. The event aims to promote awareness and understanding of artificial intelligence, with a focus on showcasing its potential through engaging activities.

data.title: European drug manufacturers, key U.S. medicine suppliers, aim to dodge Trump's new tariffs with U.S. investments and trade deals.
data.description: European companies, crucial suppliers of medications to the U.S., are optimistic that their significant investments and trade agreements with the country will shield them from the recent wave of tariffs imposed by President Trump.
US President Trump: Looks Like We’ll Have A Gaza Deal

data.title: Davis Commodities considers creating multi-billion ESG token ecosystem to connect global South projects with sustainable finance.
data.description: Davis Commodities is delving into the ESG token ecosystem, aiming to connect projects in the global South with sustainable finance options. This initiative seeks to leverage blockchain technology to facilitate the flow of funds towards environmentally beneficial ventures in developing nations. By exploring this innovative approach, Davis Commodities is looking to address key environmental and social challenges while promoting responsible investment practices. This move highlights the increasing importance of ESG considerations in the financial sector.

data.title: Dr. Stephen Liu appointed as Chief of Hematology and Oncology at MedStar Georgetown University Hospital for advanced cancer care.
data.description: MedStar Georgetown is enhancing patient care by collaborating with leading cancer experts worldwide. In a recent announcement in Washington on Sept. 26, 2025, MedStar Health introduced Dr. Stephen Liu as the new division chief of Hematology and Oncology. This strategic partnership aims to deliver cutting-edge treatment to patients, leveraging the expertise of renowned specialists.

data.title: FAA may restore Boeing's airplane safety check authority, letting employees perform some checks on 737 MAX jets. FAA to focus on quality.
data.description: Government regulators are set to relax restrictions on Boeing Co. (NYSE: BA) by granting back some control for final safety inspections on their planes. The Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) is anticipated to permit Boeing employees to again oversee safety checks on 737 MAX jets in a phased manner, detailed by The Wall Street Journal. Although FAA inspectors will still issue the ultimate airworthiness certificates, they will now prioritize supervising production quality. This shift follows heightened scrutiny enacted in 2019 post two fatal 737 MAX crashes, after which corresponding authority was withdrawn. In other news, Boeing is scheduled to deliver the first 737 Max aircraft to VietJet, nearly a decade subsequent to its initial order placement.

data.title: Cronos wipes out Trump-fueled gains, faces demand concerns. Over $6B lost post-peak, a 50% market cap decline.
data.description: Since reaching its peak during the Trump news-driven rally, Cronos has experienced a decrease of over $6 billion, representing a drop of almost 50% in its market capitalization.
